This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The bioactive constituents of Ternatea ternatea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
